name: Cabochon Sand Dollar Fossil Silver Ring
description: This handcrafted sterling silver ring features a genuine sand dollar fossil cabochon, securely encased in a smooth, polished bezel setting with a clean, modern band. Because each fossil is a natural artifact of the sea, every ring is one-of-a-kind, showcasing its own unique patterns and earthy textures. Each piece is meticulously made to order, ensuring a personalized touch for this timeless, coastal-inspired accessory.
shortDescription: This handcrafted, made-to-order sterling silver ring features a genuine, one-of-a-kind sand dollar fossil cabochon, creating a unique and personalized piece of coastal-inspired jewelry.
careInstructions: STORAGE: Store in a cool, dry place. Use an airtight bag or jewelry pouch to prevent oxidation. Keep individual pieces separate to avoid scratches. MAINTENANCE: Wear your jewelry often; skin oils help prevent tarnish. Clean with a soft polishing cloth specifically for silver. Avoid paper towels or abrasive fabrics.
